info.title: Karma V2 API
info.description: API documentation for Karma V2 endpoints - Modern API for managing grants, projects, communities, and funding applications.

get.description: List or search projects. When "q" parameter is provided, searches projects by title, slug, or description. Supports sorting via "sortBy" (createdAt, updatedAt, title, noOfGrants, noOfProjectMilestones, noOfGrantMilestones) and "sortOrder" (asc, desc). Response format depends on "page" parameter: with "page" returns { payload: [...], pagination: {...} }, without "page" returns [...] (legacy array format).

parameters.description: Search query string (minimum 3 characters). When provided, searches projects by title, slug, or description.
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-50, default: 10)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Page number for pagination (1-based). When provided, returns paginated response format { payload: [], pagination: {} }.
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: Field to sort by: createdAt, updatedAt, title, noOfGrants, noOfProjectMilestones, noOfGrantMilestones
parameters.name: sortBy

parameters.description: When true, includes stats for each project: grantsCount, grantMilestonesCount, roadmapItemsCount
parameters.name: includeStats

parameters.description: When true, excludes projects with "test" (case-insensitive) in title
parameters.name: excludeTestProjects

parameters.description: When true, only returns projects that have at least one payout address configured (payoutAddress or chainPayoutAddress)
parameters.name: hasPayoutAddress

network_addresses_verified.description: Network addresses that were verified by deployer

hasNextPage.description: Whether there is a next page

hasPrevPage.description: Whether there is a previous page

get.description: Check if a project slug is available for use. Returns 200 OK with availability status. If the slug is taken, includes information about the existing project.

available.description: Whether the slug is available for use

existingProject.description: Information about existing project if slug is taken

get.description: Get project by UID or slug (auto-detected). Supports both 0x-prefixed UIDs and slug identifiers

network_addresses_verified.description: Network addresses that were verified by deployer

post.summary: Generate Presigned URL for Project Logo Upload
post.description: Generate a presigned URL for uploading project logo images to S3

fileName.description: Name of the file to upload

uploadUrl.description: Presigned URL for uploading the file

finalUrl.description: Final URL where the file will be accessible

key.description: Unique key identifying the uploaded file

post.description: Promote a temporarily uploaded logo file to permanent storage and associate it with a project

tempKey.description: Temporary S3 key of the uploaded file

projectId.description: Project identifier to associate with the logo

permanentUrl.description: Permanent URL of the promoted file

permanentKey.description: Permanent S3 key of the file

put.description: Update the regions assigned to a project. Only community administrators can perform this operation.

regions.description: Array of region IDs to assign to the project (maximum 1)

projectUID.description: Project unique identifier

regions.description: Updated regions associated with the project

put.description: Update chain-specific payout addresses for a project. Requires authentication. Only project admins (owner or admin members) or staff can update. Pass empty string or null for a chain ID to remove that address.

additionalProperties.description: Wallet address for receiving donations on this chain, or empty/null to remove

chainPayoutAddresses.description: Map of chain IDs to payout wallet addresses. Use empty string or null to remove an address.

projectUID.description: Project unique identifier

chainPayoutAddress.description: Updated map of chain IDs to payout wallet addresses

get.description: Get project activities, project milestones, and grant milestones from all chains for a project (by UID or slug). Optionally filter grant milestones by program IDs.

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of program IDs in format programId_chainId (e.g., 920_42161,921_42161)
parameters.name: programIds

parameters.description: Flag to include funding application milestone completion data. Set to "true" to enable.
parameters.name: includeFundingApplicationData

unitOfMeasure.description: Unit of measure for the indicator

associations.description: Associations with grants, indicators, and deliverables

title.description: Milestone title - what needs to be done

completionDetails.description: Completion details - what was actually done (null if not completed)

title.description: Milestone title - what needs to be done

completionDetails.description: Completion details - what was actually done (null if not completed)

verificationDetails.description: On-chain verification details (null if not verified)

referenceNumber.description: Funding application reference number

fundingApplicationCompletion.description: Funding application milestone completion data if project is linked to a funding application

refUID.description: Reference UID of the associated grant

chainId.description: Chain ID where the grant exists

proofOfWork.description: Proof of work URL or description

get.description: Get project-level milestones (roadmap items) for a project by UID or slug. These are different from grant milestones.
Get all grants for a project by UID or slug. Returns grants with milestones, updates, and completion data.

parameters.description: Project identifier - either a UID (0x-prefixed hex string) or a slug
parameters.name: identifier

get.description: Get project, grant, funding application, and mapped milestones with completion data. Returns application milestones mapped to on-chain grant milestones (with UIDs for attestation). Supports both project UID and slug identifiers.

parameters.description: Project UID or slug (auto-detected by 0x prefix)
parameters.name: identifier

parameters.description: Program ID to filter the grant
parameters.name: programId

network_addresses_verified.description: Network addresses that were verified by deployer

projectUID.description: Associated project UID

grant.description: Grant for this project and program

chainID.description: Blockchain chain ID (null for off-chain programs)

ownerAddress.description: Wallet address of the person who submitted the application

internalAIEvaluation.description: Internal AI evaluation (only visible to reviewers/admins, never shown to applicants)

submissionIP.description: IP address from which the application was submitted

referenceNumber.description: Unique reference number for the application

projectUID.description: Project UID when application is approved

postApprovalSubmittedAt.description: When post-approval form was first submitted

postApprovalCompleted.description: Tracking completion status of post-approval form

appReviewers.description: Array of program reviewer wallet addresses assigned to this application

milestoneReviewers.description: Array of milestone reviewer wallet addresses assigned to this application

onChainMilestoneUID.description: On-chain milestone UID from grant (for attestation)

mappedMilestones.description: Application milestones mapped to on-chain grant milestones with completion data

get.description: Check if a contract address is already associated with another project. Returns availability status and existing project information if the address is in use. Requires authentication.
Download projects as CSV file filtered by date range. Returns a CSV file with project data for projects created between startDate and endDate.
Lookup the deployer address of a smart contract. Returns the address that originally deployed the contract along with transaction details. Requires authentication.

parameters.description: Smart contract address to lookup deployer for
parameters.name: contractAddress

txHash.description: Transaction hash that deployed the contract

post.description: Generate a verification message for contract ownership verification. Returns a message following EIP-4361 standards that the user must sign with their wallet. The nonce is stored for 5 minutes and must be used in the verification request. Requires authentication.

contractAddress.description: Smart contract address to verify ownership for

userAddress.description: Current user wallet address (for logging purposes)

nonce.description: Unique nonce for replay protection (expires in 5 minutes)

expiresAt.description: ISO timestamp when the nonce expires

deployerAddress.description: Full deployer address (unmasked) for wallet comparison

post.description: Verify a signed message and mark the contract as verified. Validates that the signature was created by the contract deployer address. Updates both the attestation and project tables with the verified contract information. Does not require authentication - the cryptographic signature proves ownership.

signature.description: Signature from wallet signing the verification message

nonce.description: Nonce from the verification message generation

projectUid.description: Project UID to associate the verified contract with

verifiedBy.description: Address that verified the contract ownership

get.description: Get all communities with optional filtering and pagination

hasNextPage.description: Whether there is a next page

hasPrevPage.description: Whether there is a previous page

get.description: Get global statistics across all communities including total grants, projects funded, and milestones completed

totalGrants.description: Total count of grants across all communities

totalProjectUpdates.description: Total number of project updates including milestones and updates

activeBuilders.description: Number of unique members across all projects

get.description: Get a community by its UID or slug identifier
Get community statistics by slug

totalProjects.description: Total number of projects in the community

totalGrants.description: Total number of grants in the community

totalMilestones.description: Total number of milestones in the community

projectUpdates.description: Project Updates: sum of project milestones, project milestone completions, project updates, grant milestones, grant milestone completions, and grant updates

projectCompletedMilestones.description: Total number of completed project milestones

grantCompletedMilestones.description: Total number of completed grant milestones

projectUpdatesBreakdown.description: Detailed breakdown of project updates components

totalTransactions.description: Total number of transactions in the community

get.description: Get impact data for a community with stats and categorized segments. Optionally filter stats by programId or projectId.

totalProjects.description: Total number of projects in the community

totalCategories.description: Total number of categories with impact data

get.description: Get paginated projects by community slug

grantNames.description: List of grant names associated with the project

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the grant was completed

funding.description: Funding history including grant name and completion timestamp

joinedAt.description: Date when member joined the project

chainPayoutAddress.description: Chain-specific payout addresses keyed by chain ID

hasNextPage.description: Whether there is a next page

hasPrevPage.description: Whether there is a previous page

get.description: Get paginated project updates by community UID or slug

parameters.description: Filter by project UID or slug
parameters.name: projectId

completedBy.description: Address of the user who completed the milestone

hasNextPage.description: Whether there is a next page

hasPrevPage.description: Whether there is a previous page

get.description: Get all grants for a community with optional filtering, pagination, and export. Use download=true with format=csv|json to export.

parameters.description: Set to "true" to download as file
parameters.name: download

projectUID.description: Associated project unique identifier

get.description: Get paginated payouts for a community with filtering and sorting. Public read-only endpoint. Sensitive treasury fields are stripped from disbursement history.

parameters.description: Search by project or grant name
parameters.name: search

hasNextPage.description: Whether there is a next page

hasPrevPage.description: Whether there is a previous page

get.description: Get paginated payouts for a community with filtering and sorting. Requires community admin or staff permissions.

parameters.description: Search by project or grant name
parameters.name: search

hasNextPage.description: Whether there is a next page

hasPrevPage.description: Whether there is a previous page

get.description: Get community metrics for Filecoin community. Data is sourced from a remote Parquet file and cached with Stale-While-Revalidate pattern. Supports date range filtering.

parameters.description: Filter metrics from this date (inclusive, YYYY-MM-DD)
parameters.name: startDate

parameters.description: Filter metrics until this date (inclusive, YYYY-MM-DD)
parameters.name: endDate

parameters.description: The community UID (0x...) or slug identifier
parameters.name: uidOrSlug

get.description: Get community information along with its configuration by slug or UID. Requires staff authentication.

put.description: Update community configuration settings including public visibility and rank by slug or UID. Requires staff authentication.

get.description: Get comprehensive metrics for a community including program and application statistics

totalPrograms.description: Total number of programs in the community

post.description: DEPRECATED: This endpoint is deprecated. Milestone verification sync to whitelabel now happens automatically via the attestation listener. Only community admins or program reviewers can verify completions. Owners cannot verify their own milestones.

id.description: The unique identifier of the milestone completion

referenceNumber.description: The reference number of the funding application

milestoneFieldLabel.description: The field label of the milestone

completionText.description: The completion text from the owner

ownerAddress.description: The address of the application owner who completed the milestone

verifiedBy.description: The address of the reviewer who verified the milestone

verifiedAt.description: The timestamp when the milestone was verified

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the completion was created

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the completion was last updated

post.description: Create on-chain attestation for milestone completion as a program reviewer. This endpoint creates a "completed" attestation using the backend admin wallet. Only program reviewers can use this endpoint. If the milestone is already completed or user is not a program reviewer, the request will be rejected. After completion, the frontend should dispatch the verification attestation signed by the current logged-in user.

delete.description: Delete a milestone from a funding application. Only milestone reviewers can delete milestones. Removes milestone from application, deletes off-chain completions, and revokes on-chain attestation if exists.

milestoneRemoved.description: Whether milestone was removed from application

put.description: Edit a milestone definition in a funding application. Only the application owner or team members can edit milestones. Verified milestones cannot be edited.

milestoneFieldLabel.description: Field label of the milestone array in application data

referenceNumber.description: Reference number of the funding application

hasExistingCompletion.description: Whether the milestone has an existing completion submission
